feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Odata service that returns data to the online store
entry.content:
Hello,
I would like to create an Odata service that retrieves data for a customer in SAP.
I'm fairly new to this topic and don't know my way around yet.
The data should then be displayed in our online store.

The customer number and email of the customer are also transferred from the online store in the URL so that the corresponding customer can be found.

Do you have any ideas on how exactly I can implement this?

I would also like to know how the parameters from the URL can be used in the SQL query.

Thank you very much!

entry.title: To add an additional value in the selection list in the Work Pack Grouping attribute.
entry.content:
Hello all,

I want to add a new field as attribute in the grouping criteria for the work pack.

There is already a list of 50 attributes (fields) from maintenance order, and I want to add another field as an attribute to this list, for SUPPLIER for the operation form services tab, when enhanced procurement mode is set ON; and NOT the SUPPLIER field which is present in the external data tab.

How can I do this?

entry.title: Credit Exposure in Sales Contract
entry.content:
How the credit exposure impact in Sales Contract, will it consume all the credit on the basis of Contract value or periodically it will consume the credit and update the exposure?

 

Please share the config information.

entry.title: Deatils of PR Items not displaying in My Inbox application of Fiori.
entry.content:
The details of PR Items not displaying in My Inbox application of Fiori after upgrading to S/4 HANA 2023.

Maintained the visualization parameters as mentioned in the sap note 3289039.

Item details started to appear after that, but administrative data started to disappear, which used to appear earlier.

I need both administrative data and Item details on the work item in My Inbox application.

Any suggestions or input is much appreciated.

entry.title: ""SETS" is not allowed here" - error message post conversion in S/4 HANA 2023, but no error in ECC.
entry.content:
Hello all,

We have a case where a custom table has a field 'SETS'. 

The code in ECC vs S/4 HANA is seen below:

There are no ABAP documentation on why it 'SETS' shouldn't be used. 

Any suggestions on why this is the case in S/4?
We can fix by below approach; any other suggestions are also welcome.

BR,

Ajay

entry.title: Why does ABAP quick fix put all the words in new line including the where condition?
entry.content:
Hello all,

After converting from ECC EHP8 to S/4 HANA 2023 we are using the ABAP quick fix and recommended quick fix. I found some difference between 'Recommended quick fix' vs Quick fix.

After Quick fix:

Problem statement:

All fields are moved one below the other; even the 'Where' condition statement! Pretty Printer is also not applied.

After Recommended quick fix: 

The code being replaced is neatly commented with information on what is replaced. Also Pretty Printer is applied.

Am I missing any setting in ADT to enable pretty printer for Quick fix?

Also, i'm able to do 'Recommended Quick fix' only in ATC Problems view. Not in Problems view. 

BR,

Ajay Mukundan

entry.title: Issue in Display of Cost in S_ALR_8103558 report against Statistical WBS.
entry.content:
Issue in Display of Actual Cost in SAP Standard S_ALR_8103558 reports against Statistical WBS elements.

Please refer the following scenarios:

Project Structure in CJ20N:

Project is Statistical Nature:

 

All WBSEs checked with Statistical-

 

 

Actual Cost showing in CN41N report:

 

Actual cost showing against the Project / WBS is INR 100,000.00

Hence the Assigned Value will be 100,000.00 + 280,000.00 = 380,000.00

 

Assigned Value in CJ33 Screen:

 

Assigned value showing correct with reference to earlier calculation and screenshot.

Analysis of Active Availability Control 1:

 

Only one cost element has been shown as “exempted” which is not being used in present scenario.

 

Actual Cost of INR 100,000.00 booked in Value Type 11

Assigned values are also 200,000.00 + 180,000.00 = 380,000.00 (Actual Cost included here)

 

Actual Cost Line Items CJI3 Report:

 

Actual Cost showing 100,000.00 INR.

But when we view the S_ALR_87013558 and similar reports:

Here Actual Cost columns showing Zero value which is not correct.

 

Please note that this issue is coming only for Statistical WBSe only.

When we posted the actual cost using the similar G/L accounts against regular Project WBS which are not statistical, actual values are showing properly in ALR reports.

These reports are very important to identify the available amount for further planning activity in projects but wrong figures often misleading the Project planners.

I have referred multiple Notes from SAP and our all settings looks OK.

Please let me know if anything has been missed here or any note needs to be implemented.

Please help on this matter.

entry.title: S4HANA Sales Order API(A2X) taking longer processing time with huge number of line item
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have Integration between BTP-IS & S4 where we are creating Sales Orders in S4 using the API_SALES_ORDER_SRV API .

S4HANA Sales Order API (A2X) is taking longer processing time to create Sales Order with huge number of line items.

We have done lot of customizations to the api at abap end due to client requirements.

How can we fix this problem as it is taking 2 mins to create order with 100 line items.

 

SAP Integration Suite SAP BTP, ABAP environment SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment 

test automation tool for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 

SAP S/4HANA API Management API

entry.title: How do you navigate Revision changes to a Material within MRP?
entry.content:
Hello,

We are a manufacturing company using MRP in S/4 Hana. Currently we have materials being managed using MRP that are undergoing revision changes. We cannot use the 'discontinued parts' with follow ups because there will not be a new material number. How can you navigate a change in revision to a part currently using MRP where the current stock needs to be depleted?

entry.title: Query related to SAP Note-2270261
entry.content:
Hi team,

I am seeking one clarification about SAP Note 2270261.

In note it is mentioned that-With SAP S/4HANA 1511 the target for links and references in reports CJI3N, CJI4N, CN41, CNS0 is going to the single maintenance transaction CJ20N (Project Builder).and n case of custom code for special maintenance functions only, customer should consider to enable the custom code for the Project Builder transactions

I am not getting exactly what will be changing by target for links and  references in reports means and for what exactly need to consider to enable CJ20N from custom code perspective.

Awaiting more clear understanding about this . thanks.

Regards,

Prajakta

entry.title: Too many entries in smq1 with destination none
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We have queue name MCEX47 and it have many entries with destination none is it safe to clear them all as it giving error during upgrade.

 

Thanks

entry.title: List of Standard Fiori Apps available in S4 HANA
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

Kindly provide list of available standard Fiori apps in S4 HANA.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Commitment Item can not be assigned to G/L account although FSG is maintained (Error FIPOS 019)
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I activated the project cash management, using transaction OPI6 in SAP S/4HANA .

When I try to execute FIPOS to create commitment items, the following error appears - even after changing the FSG as mentioned in the procedure below (with T-Code OBC4). Can anyone help out? 

Many thanks in advance!

 

Errors occurred as the G/L accounts were being saved

Message no. FIPOS019

Diagnosis

The commitment item cannot be assigned to the G/L account because the state of the G/L account does not permit this transaction.

System Response

The G/L accounts affected are not saved. They have the status Inconsistent.

If you have created a new commitment item for the G/L accounts, the system saves that commitment item.

Procedure

Correct the G/L accounts, thereby making entry of commitment items possible.

Check the relevant G/L accounts: Change G/L Account.

It is possible that the commitment item field is hidden in the field status group for the G/L account.

entry.title: Standard Tabs (Payment transactions and Address overview) are missing in BP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

While creating or display of BP Master Standard tabs (Payment transactions and Address overview) are missing. We have already verified BUSD and required settings are already configured but still these tabs are missing.

Please can you let us know how to add missing standard tabs in BP.

Appreciate your help and support.

Thanks,

Vijay Elluri

entry.title: Customer Master Delivery Block Prevents Delivery Creation – How to Only Block Goods Issue?
entry.content:
My client has requested the possibility to set a block on a customer that allows the creation of sales orders and deliveries, but prevents goods issue posting in the delivery.

I have already created a delivery block (IMG > Logistic Execution > Shipping > Deliveries > Define Reasons for Blocking in Shipping) and flagged only the "Goods Issue" box. When applied directly to the delivery, the block works correctly.

However, when I assign the block at the customer master data level (Customer Master > Sales Data > Shipping Tab > Delivery Block for Sales Area), the sales order can be created, but I am unable to create the delivery. Whether I try through VL10C or VL01N, the delivery cannot be created because the customer/order has the delivery block applied (even though, as mentioned earlier, only the "Goods Issue" flag is selected).

It seems that, by standard, in S4H, assigning a delivery block in customer master data or in the sales order prevents delivery creation altogether, regardless of the flags set in customizing.

Do you have any suggestions on how to manage this request?

Thank you!

entry.title: cds based code list Custom field added by fiori to sales pricing search help not working in VK11?
entry.content:
I added a custom field for pricing in SD using the Fiori app, and linked a CDS view(I_Storagelocation) for the search help. The search help works fine in Fiori, but it's not showing in the SAP GUI transaction VK11. The field itself is visible in VK11, but no search help is available. Additionaly in KONP structure no search help available. How can I add search help for VK11 to for this field. 

 

Fiori App:

GUI:

entry.title: Bank determination configuration for Virtual Card payment method
entry.content:
Our client is using supplier financing with Virtual card as one of the payment method for vendor payments

In FBZP under payment method at country. i selected Supplier financing under payment method classification

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/b2d44c1091094b5a810c2a879ee95522/456ad556235247d0bcefe88572406429.html?version=2023.001

Issue with bank determination

  1. when generating the payment proposal for all company codes it is looking for bank determination configuration (error)
  2. At the  time of payment run money doesn't go out of clients bank account but the bank finances to the vendor from its own funds and issue Virtual cards to the vendors.
  3. At the end of the month bank will issue a invoice to clients only for the used virtual cards.
  4. Monthly payment will go out of only clients bank account.

As there is no link with the bank account, Can you advice how this can be managed in FBZP as there is no House bank and Account ID for Virtual card payment method.

entry.title: How to use FILTER condition in HTTP Receiver Adapter for SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Techies, 

 

I would like to bring up here one interesting Topic in this blog, Which I have faced few issues while using the HTTP Receiver Adapter in SAP CPI.

I have faced issues with the OData Adapter that GET was not successful due to some Conversion of date with Exception. So decided to use HTTP Adapter instead of OData.

By using OData adapter its pretty simple that we can filter condition while configuring the fields in OData fields selection level and based on the selected fields and filters query will be generated automatically.

But Incase of HTTP Adapter we need to manually form the Query in Param1=Value1&Param2=Value2 like this. This format will work if I want to use only with field level Query.

I want to use Filter in the Query tab I have used below format
$filter=Material='1234' 

$filter=Materialeq'1234'  but no luck 😞

Finally after so many trail and error methods below format is working and its able to fetch only particular Materials.

$filter=Material%20eq%20'1234'

The formation of the query should be separated with %20 before and after eq

So, by using the above format we can the Filter condition in HTTP Receiver condition and also SKIP and TOP also will be accepted by HTTP Adapter Query level.

$filter=Material%20eq%20'1234'&$top=10&$skip=5

 

Thanks & Regards, 

SaiBandaru

SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration

SAP S/4HANA SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration

entry.title: replacement app for CBIH52 transaction
entry.content:
HI support team,

may i know the equivalent app for CBIH52 transaction

entry.title: Performance comparison between Code Pushdown Technique vs Traditional ABAP
entry.content:
Hi @everyone,

 

Case 1 - When we use code pushdown technique and pushed where conditions to CDS along with Parameterized CDS

Case 2 - When we use Parameterized CDS but didn't pushed where conditions to CDS

Case 3 - When we use normal CDS view with pushing where condition to CDS ( All filtering happened on Application layer )

In the above mentioned three cases here are the observations -

  • In this scenario I have utilized code pushdown technique and pushed all where condition in CDS and also I am utilizing Parameterized CDS to narrow down data from Database itself but in this scenario when I ran SQL Traces ( Case 1 ) it took more time in execution than the scenario where I just utilized parameterized CDS without any where condition ( Case 2 ) and the fastest execution happened when I utilized normal CDS ( Case 3 )

I have some open question related to CDS performance tuning as below -

  1. Is Code pushdown ( with Parameter and where ) slower than application layer filtering
  2. if not then how can we decide when to use parameterized CDS or when to use normal
  3. is where on CDS taking more time than application layer filtering

Looking forward to get the correct understanding.. @Andre_Fischer , @thomas_jung , @RichHeilman 

Regards,

Harshit
